diagrams.title: CMMI Maturity Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the 5 levels of CMMI maturity from Initial to Optimizing
diagrams.purpose: Visualize process maturity progression and understand how organizations advance in capability

diagrams.title: Product vs Process Quality Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Two overlapping circles showing relationship between product and process quality
elements: Product Quality Circle: Functionality, Reliability, Usability
Process Quality Circle: Methods, Tools, Practices
diagrams.purpose: Understand the relationship and overlap between product and process quality approaches

diagrams.title: PDCA Continuous Improvement Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing the four phases of continuous improvement
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the iterative nature of quality improvement efforts

diagrams.title: Cost of Quality Iceberg
diagrams.description: Iceberg diagram showing visible and hidden quality costs
elements: Above water (visible): Prevention costs, Appraisal costs
Below water (hidden): Internal failure costs, External failure costs
Water line showing total cost of quality
Dashed arrow showing relationship: prevention reduces failure
diagrams.purpose: Understand that failure costs are often larger than visible costs, emphasizing prevention

diagrams.title: ISO/IEC 25010 Quality Characteristics
diagrams.description: Eight product quality characteristics arranged in groups
diagrams.purpose: Remember all eight product quality characteristics for the standard

visuals.title: Product Versus Process Quality Management
visuals.description: Visual diagram for product versus process quality management
